invalid.title: Invite link not valid
invalid.body: This QR code or link has expired or been revoked. Ask the other player for a fresh one.

cta.title: Connect with {name}
cta.body: Sign in or create a free account. You'll be connected automatically.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your Dice Vault

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Start tracking your scores
register.name: Your name
register.checkEmail: Check your email! We sent you a verification link.

verify.title: Verify email
verify.success: Email verified! You can now log in.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent: If this email is registered, you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes.

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password of at least 11 characters.
reset.success: Password changed. You can now log in.

totp.title: Two-factor authentication
totp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
totp.expired: Session expired. Please log in again.

errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email first. Check your inbox.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 11 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.mfaRequired: Your account requires MFA to be set up before you can log in. Please contact support.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a while and try again.
